allow: Bash(rm -rf /tmp/my-demo-app && node --loader ts-node/esm test-scaffold.mjs 2>&1 || npx tsx test-scaffold.mjs 2>&1)

Bash(cat > .gitignore << 'EOF'
node_modules/
dist/
.env
*.log
.DS_Store
.claude/
EOF

git rm -r --cached node_modules dist .claude 2>/dev/null || true
git add .
git status --short | head -30)
